title: Spruce Bookshelves
description: This pack changes the bookshelf texture to match the spruce planks
body:
This resource pack changes the bookshelf texture to match the look of spruce planks, so it blends better with your spruce builds.

![The bookshelf texture compared to the spruce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51869173345237f5efa01d25cfd2870cd0482a29_0.webp)
